src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Removed inheritance from WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter which is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7+ and removed in 6.0.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: Changed class declaration from 'extends WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter' to a standalone class.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Replaced the deprecated configure(HttpSecurity) method with a SecurityFilterChain bean definition.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: Created a @Bean method returning SecurityFilterChain that builds and returns the HttpSecurity configuration.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Updated AuthenticationManager bean to use AuthenticationConfiguration instead of super.authenticationManagerBean().
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: Changed bean method to accept AuthenticationConfiguration and call getAuthenticationManager().

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Replaced the deprecated globalUserDetails method with AuthenticationManagerBuilder configuration inside the filter chain or separate bean (implied by removal of old method and lack of replacement in this specific file, likely moved or handled differently, but the removal of the old deprecated hook is the key change here).
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: Removed the @Autowired globalUserDetails method that configured UserDetailsService and PasswordEncoder.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Updated permitted URL patterns to match OpenAPI 3.0 (Swagger 3) endpoints instead of Swagger 2.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: Changed antMatchers to include '/v3/api-docs/**' and '/swagger-ui/**' instead of '/v2/api-docs' and '/swagger-resources/**'.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Removed imports for classes no longer used after the security configuration refactoring.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: Removed imports for UserDetailsServiceImpl, AuthenticationManagerBuilder, WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter, BCryptPasswordEncoder, and Autowired.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Added formatter off/on comments to preserve the fluent API style of the HttpSecurity builder.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: Added //@formatter:off and //@formatter:on around the http.cors()...build() chain.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Migrate from Springfox (Swagger 2) to SpringDoc OpenAPI (Swagger 3) to support OpenAPI 3.0 specification.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: Replaced imports from `springfox.documentation.*` with `io.swagger.v3.oas.models.*` and changed bean return type from `Docket` to `OpenAPI`.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Switch configuration property binding from manual `@Value` injections to Spring Boot's `@ConfigurationProperties` for cleaner code.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: Added `@ConfigurationProperties(prefix = "swagger")` and `@Getter`/`@Setter` annotations, removing individual `@Value` annotations and `@PropertySource`.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Rename field `licence` to `appLicense` to align with standard naming conventions and new property binding.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: Changed private field `private String licence;` to `private String appLicense;`.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Rename field `licenceUrl` to `appLicenseUrl` to align with standard naming conventions and new property binding.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: Changed private field `private String licenceUrl;` to `private String appLicenseUrl;`.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Rename field `contactEmail` to `contactMail` to match the expected property key or internal naming preference.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: Changed private field `private String contactEmail;` to `private String contactMail;`.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Replace Springfox's builder pattern for API info with direct object instantiation for OpenAPI 3.0 `Info` object.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: Replaced `new ApiInfoBuilder()...build()` with `new Info()` and explicit setters for title, version, description, license, and contact.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Define Bearer JWT security scheme explicitly in the OpenAPI components instead of using global operation parameters.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: Added `Components` with `SecurityScheme` of type `HTTP` and scheme `bearer`, and added `SecurityRequirement` to the `OpenAPI` object.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Remove the legacy method for adding global header parameters as this is now handled by the security scheme definition.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: Deleted the `getHeaderParams()` method and its usage in the `api()` bean definition.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Added the 'final' keyword to a local variable declaration to enforce immutability.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: UserDetails userDetails -> final UserDetails userDetails

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Corrected missing whitespace after a comma in a method argument list for better readability.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: null,userDetails.getAuthorities() -> null, userDetails.getAuthorities()

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Migrated JWT handling from io.jsonwebtoken (jjwt) to com.auth0.jwt to align with the new dependency set.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: Replaced imports of io.jsonwebtoken.* with com.auth0.jwt.* and updated method calls from Jwts.builder() to JWT.create().

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Replaced hardcoded security constants with a dedicated properties class to support configuration-driven settings.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: Removed static import of SecurityConstants and injected JwtProperties via @RequiredArgsConstructor to access issuer, secret, and expiration.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Adapted token generation logic to use the Auth0 JWT API syntax and configuration properties.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: Changed Jwts.builder().setClaims()...signWith() to JWT.create().withSubject()...sign(Algorithm.HMAC256(...)).

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Adapted token parsing and verification logic to use the Auth0 JWT API syntax.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: Replaced Jwts.parser().parseClaimsJws() with JWT.require(Algorithm.HMAC256(...)).build().verify() returning DecodedJWT.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Remove leading whitespace in SLF4J log format string to ensure correct parameter substitution and cleaner output.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: Changed log.info(" {} has successfully logged in!", ...) to log.info("{} has successfully logged in!", ...)

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent to 2.7.4 to align with Java 11 support and modernize the framework baseline.
Increment project version to 2.0.0 to reflect the major migration.
Update project description to reflect the new Spring Boot version.
Configure the project to compile and run on Java 11.
Upgrade MapStruct to 1.5.2.Final for better Java 11 compatibility and features.
Define version property for the new OpenAPI Swagger library.
Remove property for the deprecated Springfox Swagger library.
Remove explicit Maven plugin version property, likely relying on parent or defaults.
Replace io.jsonwebtoken jjwt with com.auth0 java-jwt to support the new versioning scheme.
Remove explicit Lombok version to inherit it from the Spring Boot parent BOM.
Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI UI.

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Update Docker Compose file version to 3.8 to align with newer Docker Compose specifications.
Quote the port mapping string to prevent YAML interpretation issues and adhere to stricter syntax standards.
